shop.shardLoreAgility: A shard of pure swiftness. Quickens every action and turns near-misses into full dodges.
shop.shardLoreAir: A breath of the high winds frozen in crystal. Multiplies speed beyond mortal limits.
shop.shardLoreAttack: Raw martial focus crystallized in mineral form. Sharpens the edge of every strike dealt.
shop.shardLoreCounter: Retaliation made manifest. Turns the weight of the enemy's own strikes back upon them.
shop.shardLoreDefense: Iron-hard essence of resilience. Fortifies armor and dulls the weight of incoming blows.
shop.shardLoreEarth: Stone-solid resolve bound in shard. Crushes foes beneath an immovable weight.
shop.shardLoreFire: A crystallized essence of pure fire. Seeps into wounds, burning long after the strike.
shop.shardLoreWater: Distilled tide in solid form. Mends flesh and shields the soul from further harm.

tutorial.boss-preview.body:
Every few loops, a BOSS tile spawns at the end of the path. Beat it to safely exit the run with full rewards.

Die mid-loop and you keep only a fraction of what you earned.

Click START LOOP to send your hero out.
tutorial.boss-preview.title: Bosses every few loops.
tutorial.combat-intro.body:
Cards in your deck play themselves on cooldown, top to bottom.

Light cards cycle fast and chip damage. Heavy cards hit hard but recharge slowly.

When a card uses a new KEYWORD (Vengeance, Brace, Haste, Pierce, Exhaust), the game pauses on its own to teach it.

Sit back — your deck handles the rest.
tutorial.combat-intro.title: Combat is automatic.
tutorial.combatBody:
Your hero plays cards on cooldown — you do not click to attack.
Cards in the hand fire one at a time from top to bottom.
Light cards (low cooldown) cycle fast; heavy cards hit harder but recharge slow.

KEYWORDS (Brace, Vengeance, Haste, Pierce, Exhaust) change HOW a card resolves.
The first time you play a card with a new keyword, the game pauses and
explains it.

STACKS are the colored tokens an attack piles on a target — Burn, Bleed
and Poison deal damage every tick; Stun and Slow hold the enemy back;
Rage powers your own payoffs. STAT-SCALING means a card grows with your
attributes (STR/DEX/INT/VIT/SPI) — e.g. more STR = more damage.
These tokens are NOT pop-up taught: open the "?" Glossary any time for
a full reference of every stack and stat.
tutorial.complete.body:
You've seen everything you need: your deck, the loop, combat keywords, planning, and the forge.

Good luck out there.
tutorial.complete.title: That's it.
tutorial.deck-review.body:
These are your 5 starter cards. In combat they play themselves on cooldown, TOP to BOTTOM.

• Hover any card to read what it does.
• DRAG a card onto another slot to swap their order — front-load fast attacks, back-load big finishers.

When you're ready, click BACK to start the run.
tutorial.deck-review.title: Meet your deck.
tutorial.deckBody:
Before each run, pick a deck TEMPLATE — a 5-card starter tuned for
a particular playstyle (Iron Wall, Berserker, Pyromancer, …).

Cards play themselves in combat, top to bottom, on cooldown.
The Deck panel (mid-run, from the loop overlay) lets you REORDER
cards — new ones you forge or find are added straight to it.
tutorial.forge-craft.body: Tap your two element sigils on the rack to load the runes, then press ⚒ FORGE. Leave when the card is made.
tutorial.forge-craft.title: Combine elements.
tutorial.forge-intro.body:
Click the FORGE button (top-left icon row of the planning screen).

The forge turns elements into new cards. You just bought two — combine them into a tier-2 card.
tutorial.forge-intro.title: Forge a card.
tutorial.map-intro.body:
Your hero auto-scrolls right through a looped path of tiles. You don't move them — you decide what's on the path.

Each loop, tiles trigger encounters: combat, treasure, events, and bosses.

Watch the hero approach the first tile…
tutorial.map-intro.title: The loop walks itself.
tutorial.pick-warrior.body:
Two classes — Warrior swings steel, Mage hurls elements. For the tutorial we'll run the Warrior.

Click the Warrior card to confirm.
tutorial.pick-warrior.title: Pick a class.
tutorial.place-subtile.body:
Combat tiles reserve their neighbour slots (cyan border). Subtiles go there and BUFF the adjacent fight.

Pick one from the smaller row below (Ambush, Mana Well, Magma Burst…) and click an open reserved slot.
tutorial.place-subtile.title: Drop a subtile.
tutorial.place-tile.body:
Pick the FOREST tile from the inventory (leftmost icon).

Then click an empty slot on the path above to drop it in.
tutorial.place-tile.title: Place a combat tile.
tutorial.planning-intro.body:
Every time you finish a loop, planning opens. Spend TILE POINTS (TP, top-right) to shape the next pass:

• Place tiles on the path: combat, treasure, events.
• Reserved slots (cyan border) accept SUBTILES — small buffs for adjacent fights.
• Toggle Remove Mode to take a tile off and get 50% TP back.
tutorial.planning-intro.title: Plan the next loop.
tutorial.relicsBody:
Relics are passive artifacts you BUY in the shop — they are never
equipped or unequipped, just owned.

Each relic listens for a trigger (you took a hit, an enemy died,
armor broke, a stack tipped past a threshold, …) and fires a
bonus effect when it sees that trigger.

In the shop, relics that combo with your deck (≥ 2 cards share a
keyword) glow gold — those are the higher-value picks for the
archetype you are running.
tutorial.shop-buy-elements.body:
ELEMENTS normally drop from defeated enemies — and here you can buy or sell them too.

Buy any TWO now (tap a −50g button twice). You'll forge them into a card next.
tutorial.shop-buy-elements.title: Buy two elements.
tutorial.shop-buy-relic.body:
RELICS are passive artifacts — buy one and it works for the rest of the run, no equipping.

Click the relic on the shelf to purchase it.
tutorial.shop-buy-relic.title: Buy a relic.
tutorial.shop-intro.body:
Forging needs ELEMENTS — and the merchant sells them.

Click the SHOP button (top-left icon row) to step inside.
tutorial.shop-intro.title: Visit the merchant.
tutorial.shop-leave.body: That's everything you need here. Click LEAVE SHOP to head back to planning.
tutorial.shop-leave.title: Leave the shop.
tutorial.subtitle: Pick a topic — read in any order. The game also pauses to teach each new keyword (Brace, Vengeance, Haste, Pierce, Exhaust); stacks & stats live in the "?" Glossary.
tutorial.tilesBody:
During planning you place tiles on the loop path using Tile Points (TP).

  • Click a tile in the inventory to select it, then click an empty
    slot on the path to place it.
  • Each tile costs TP. Your TP balance shows above the inventory.
  • Combat tiles reserve adjacent slots. Reserved slots only accept
    SUBTILES (ambush, mana well, war horn, …) that buff the fight.
  • Remove Mode (toggle button) refunds 50% TP when you click a
    placed tile — use it to rebuild your plan.

Beat the boss to exit safely with full rewards. Die mid-loop and
you keep only a fraction of what you earned.
tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.welcome.body:
This run is your training ground. I'll walk you through every system step by step.

You can't take a wrong turn here — the path is scripted. Just follow the highlights.
tutorial.welcome.title: Welcome, hero.
unlock.title: 🏆 New Unlock!
